title: OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER - 211info
text: SWEET HOME POLICE DEPARTMENT OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers overnight shelter when temperatures reach 32 degrees or below. 1950 Main Street Sweet Home, OR 97386 Hours: Open 24 hours per day / 7 days per week when temperatures reach 32 degrees or below Email (541) 967-3950 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 967-3950 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or check Facebook page for more information Facebook page: www.facebook.com/LinnSheriff FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Linn County Services: Community Shelters * Homeless Families Extreme Weather Shelters * Homeless Families If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SWEET HOME POLICE DEPARTMENT
